scenarios.rationale: The regression engine's docstrings claim the opportunity-priced expected-TD model beats the yardage baseline out-of-sample. This runs the real backtest (fit on 2024, score on 2025 from cached parquet) and asserts its MAE is strictly lower — substantiating the claim instead of trusting a comment. Degrades to a non-crashing miss when the parquet cache is absent. The floor is 20%, not the original 5%: the binary red-zone flag that priced opportunities before yard-line bins scored 19.34% on this exact split, so anything at or below that is a revert, not a pass.
